variants.title: Fleetguard FS19520 Fuel Filter/Water Sep Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P555002
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19520 fuel water separator spin-on works to remove water and other particulates and ensures clean fuel is delivered to your engine.

variants.title: Donaldson P555002 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P555002 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
